data.content: 1. This child requires coverage for the foolery native acceptance read path and backward-compatible legacy-note fallback. 2. The remaining foolery implementation under review is not available in this repository: commits ca6ed9a32fe4 and 55706664f98f are not valid objects here. 3. Implementation review must be based on the code plus spec, so the acceptance:null fallback tests cannot be approved until the relevant diff is available for review.
